name: hcportal_editKennel
description: Updates an existing kennel's settings. Update-only (no insert path). Covers kennel identity, dissemination settings, Google Calendar integration, payment configuration (3 payment slots), pricing defaults, currency, location, tags, membership, notifications, and feature tier. Includes duplicate-name detection with auto-suggested alternatives for KennelUniqueShortName.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: identifies the calling user. Required but declared nullable for SQL-side error trapping.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC.CHECK_PORTAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Routing: identifies the kennel to update. Required.

parameters.name: disseminateHashRunsDotOrg
parameters.description: Whether to disseminate events to HashRuns.org.

parameters.name: disseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish to global Google Calendar.
parameters.typeMismatch: Parameter is INT, table column is SMALLINT. Wider parameter could overflow on write.

parameters.name: googleCalendarId
parameters.description: Google Calendar ID for this kennel.

parameters.name: publishToGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish events to kennel's own Google Calendar.

parameters.name: publishToGoogleCalendarAddresses
parameters.description: Google Calendar addresses to publish to.

parameters.name: canEditRunAttendence
parameters.description: Whether users can edit their own run attendance.

parameters.name: kennelShortName
parameters.description: Short display name for the kennel.

parameters.name: kennelUniqueShortName
parameters.description: Globally unique short name. Validated for uniqueness with auto-suggested alternatives on conflict.
parameters.typeMismatch: Parameter is NVARCHAR(25), table column is NVARCHAR(50). Truncates values at 25 chars.

parameters.name: kennelMismanagementTeam
parameters.description: Mismanagement team details (free text or JSON).

parameters.name: defaultRunStartTime
parameters.description: Default start time for new runs.

parameters.name: digitsAfterDecimal
parameters.description: Number of decimal digits for currency display.

parameters.name: bankAccountNumber
parameters.description: Bank account number for direct transfers.

parameters.name: kennelGoogleSheetApiKey
parameters.description: Google Sheets API key for data import.

parameters.name: allowNegativeCredit
parameters.description: Whether negative credit balances are allowed.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Kennel latitude. Sentinel: 999 → set both lat and lon to NULL.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Kennel longitude. Sentinel: 999 → set both lat and lon to NULL.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags1
parameters.description: Default bit-flag primary tags for new runs.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags2
parameters.description: Default bit-flag secondary tags for new runs.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags3
parameters.description: Default bit-flag tertiary tags for new runs.

parameters.name: kennelGeolocation
parameters.description: Kennel geography point. Unusual: GEOGRAPHY type cannot be passed from most API callers. Likely only usable from within SQL.

parameters.name: membershipDurationInMonths
parameters.description: Duration of membership period in months.

parameters.name: runCountStartDate
parameters.description: Date from which run counting begins.

parameters.name: kennelSearchTags
parameters.description: Free-text search tags for kennel discovery.

parameters.name: excludeFromLeaderboard
parameters.description: Whether to exclude this kennel from leaderboards.

parameters.name: notificationMinutesBeforeRunForChatPushNotifications
parameters.description: Minutes before run to send chat push notifications.

parameters.name: notificationMinutesBeforeRunForCheckinReminder
parameters.description: Minutes before run to send check-in reminder.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: Client IP address. Used in LOG.GeneralLog message.

parameters.name: ipGeoDetails
parameters.description: IP geolocation JSON. Used in LOG.GeneralLog data field.

rowsets.description: Uses errorType codes 2 (validation) and 3 (auth/kennelId). Multiple error rowsets possible if publicHasherId and duplicate short name checks both fail. For duplicate short name errors, errorUserMessage includes auto-suggested alternatives.

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.ErrorLog on validation/auth failures
INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog on every call (after validation, with IP data)
UPDATE HC.Kennel — all provided fields via COALESCE pattern

codeSmells.issue: Wrong SP name in GeneralLog entry
codeSmells.detail: Line 268: LogSource is 'Admin Portal: hcportal_addEditEvent' (or 'HashRuns.Org hcportal_addEditEvent'). Should be hcportal_editKennel. Copy-paste bug from addEditEvent SP.
SET NOCOUNT ON is present but SET XACT_ABORT ON is missing.
No error handling. If the UPDATE fails (e.g. unique constraint violation on KennelUniqueShortName despite the pre-check), the error propagates unhandled.
The UPDATE is not wrapped in a transaction.

codeSmells.issue: Duplicate short name check has race condition
codeSmells.detail: Lines 129-162: Multiple COUNT(*) queries against HC.Kennel without locking hints. Another session could claim the same name between the check and the UPDATE.

codeSmells.issue: No way to explicitly set nullable fields to NULL
codeSmells.detail: Uses pure COALESCE with no sentinel values (except latitude/longitude). Once a nullable field has a value, there is no way to clear it back to NULL through this SP.

codeSmells.issue: Inconsistent lat/lon sentinel: 999 vs -99/-999 in addEditEvent2
codeSmells.detail: Lines 341-342: Uses positive 999 to mean 'set to NULL' for both lat and lon. addEditEvent2 uses -99.0 for lat and -999.0 for lon. Inconsistent across SPs.

codeSmells.issue: Type mismatch: @disseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar is INT, table column is SMALLINT
codeSmells.detail: Parameter is wider than column. Could silently overflow on write if value exceeds SMALLINT range.

codeSmells.issue: Length mismatch: @kennelUniqueShortName is NVARCHAR(25), table column is NVARCHAR(50)
codeSmells.detail: Parameter is narrower than column. Cannot set values longer than 25 chars even though the table allows 50.

The publicHasherId check (line 106) and duplicate short name check (line 126) both run unconditionally. If both fail, the caller receives two error rowsets. Subsequent checks do have @isError = 0 guards.

codeSmells.issue: GEOGRAPHY parameter unlikely to work from API
codeSmells.detail: Line 77: @kennelGeolocation is GEOGRAPHY type. Most API callers (including the .NET shim) cannot construct geography objects. Likely dead or only usable from within SQL.
Unlike addEditEvent2, this SP doesn't verify the UPDATE affected any rows. If @kennelId is somehow NULL (shouldn't happen given validation), the UPDATE silently does nothing.
@isAdmin is set and conditionally modified for publicHasherId 11111111-..., but only used in the GeneralLog message which itself references the wrong SP name.
Lines 106, 203: Uses DATALENGTH instead of LEN for validating publicHasherId and publicKennelId.
Lines 184-201: Entire validation block for hasher existence is commented out. The SP does not verify that publicHasherId belongs to a real user.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change errorType integer codes without updating all callers
